title: Boeing and Airbus prepare for next narrow-body battle – but airlines aren’t pushing for new jets yet
summary: Two major aircraft manufacturers are developing new narrow-body jets, but demand remains subdued as airlines prioritize current production, deliveries and existing aircraft operations.
content: Boeing and Airbus are preparing their next narrow-body jets, but airlines and investors remain focused on production, deliveries and current aircraft.

zh.title: 波音和空客准备下一场窄体飞机战争——但航空公司还不急于购买新飞机
zh.summary: 两家主要飞机制造商正在开发新型窄体飞机，但由于航空公司优先考虑现有产能、交付和现有飞机运营，需求仍然低迷。

title: VAT to be cut from household electricity bills in October
summary: The UK government will reduce VAT on household electricity bills starting in October, providing an estimated £45 annual savings per home as part of policy announced during Andy Burnham's first full day as prime minister.
content: Homes will save around £45 a year through the cut announced on Andy Burnham's first full day as prime minister.

zh.title: 10月起英国家庭电费增值税将下调
zh.summary: 英国政府将从10月开始降低家庭电费的增值税，作为首相安迪·伯纳姆就职期间宣布的政策的一部分，预计每户年省约45英镑。

title: Jamie Dimon says he wouldn’t buy Treasurys. ‘I don’t understand the upside.’
summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon, who runs one of the U.S. Treasury's primary dealers, expressed skepticism about American Treasury securities, citing unclear upside potential.
content: Jamie Dimon — long considered a potential candidate to be treasury secretary, and the person in charge of one of the nation’s primary dealers of Treasury securities — says he wouldn’t buy American debt.

zh.title: 杰米·戴蒙称他不会购买美国国债："我看不出有什么好处"
zh.summary: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙虽然运营美国财政部的主要交易商之一，但他对美国国债表示怀疑，理由是上升潜力不明确。

title: UK government borrowing lower than expected in June
summary: The UK's public finances in June performed better than anticipated with lower-than-expected government borrowing, though the country continues to carry substantial debt levels overall.
content: Public finances for last month were better than expected but the UK is carrying major debt.

zh.title: 英国六月政府借债低于预期
zh.summary: 英国六月的公共财政表现好于预期，政府借债低于预期，尽管该国总体上仍然承载着大量债务。

title: India's largest asset management firm makes a muted market debut after a $1 billion IPO
summary: SBI Funds Management completed a $1 billion IPO with oversubscription reaching $31 billion in bids, but shares opened with a subdued 7% premium.
content: SBI Funds Management, whose billion-dollar IPO garnered bids worth $31 billion, made a subdued debut with shares listing at a 7% premium.

zh.title: 印度最大资产管理公司在10亿美元IPO后市场表现平淡
zh.summary: SBI基金管理公司完成了10亿美元的IPO，超额认购达到310亿美元，但股票开盘溢价仅为7%。

title: Samsung Electronics shares rise as robotics move highlights push into physical AI
summary: Samsung Electronics shares gained after the company established a dedicated robotics division, signaling its strategic expansion into physical artificial intelligence.
content: Samsung Electronics shares rose as the company set up a robotics division in a push into physical AI.

zh.title: 三星电子股价上升，机器人举措突显其对物理人工智能的推进
zh.summary: 三星电子在成立专门的机器人部门后股价上涨，这标志着该公司战略性扩展到物理人工智能领域。

title: Iran War update: Five things to know after the resumption of hostilities
summary: The conflict between the U.S. and Iran has escalated following President Trump's declaration ending the ceasefire 10 days ago, reigniting hostilities in the Middle East.
content: It's been 10 days since U.S. President Donald Trump declared the ceasefire with Iran "over." Here's what you need to know about the conflict.

zh.title: 伊朗战争更新：恢复敌对后需了解的五件事
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布10天前停火结束后，美伊冲突升级，中东敌对行为重燃。

title: Dad facing difficult summer as food donations plunge
summary: Food banks and community food providers warn of an uncertain future as donations decline heading into summer months, threatening to deepen hardship for vulnerable communities.
content: Food banks and community larders are warning of an uncertain future.

zh.title: 父亲面临困难夏天，食物捐赠大幅下降
zh.summary: 随着夏季临近捐赠减少，食物银行和社区食品供应商对前景表示担忧，威胁加重弱势社群的困境。

title: Families skipping meals during holidays - charity
summary: Charity FareShare Sussex & Surrey reports that families are skipping meals during school holidays, describing the situation as a significant crisis amid food insecurity.
content: FareShare Sussex & Surrey says it is facing a "mountain" of need over the school holidays.

zh.title: 家庭在学假期间跳过进餐——慈善机构
zh.summary: 慈善机构FareShare Sussex & Surrey报告，家庭在学校假期期间跳过进餐，称这是食物不安全危机中的严重问题。

title: Kospi to 10,000: South Korean equities poised to rebound after brutal sell-off, says Citi
summary: Citi analysts maintain a 10,000 price target for South Korea's Kospi index, suggesting a potential 50% recovery from recent lows and reflecting confidence in market rebound.
content: Crucially, the analysts are maintaining a price target of 10,000 for the index, which would mark an increase of over 50% from Monday's closing price.

zh.title: 科斯皮指数至10,000：韩国股市在经历残酷抛售后有望反弹，花旗表示
zh.summary: 花旗分析师维持韩国科斯皮指数10,000点的目标价，表明从近期低点可能实现50%的反弹，反映了对市场反弹的信心。

title: Inflation fears are back in the spotlight as the Middle East conflict keeps oil prices elevated, analysts say
summary: Escalating U.S.-Iran tensions are keeping Middle East oil prices elevated, reigniting inflation concerns as analysts reassess commodity market impacts and geopolitical risk premiums.
content: Inflation fears are back in focus amid worries over escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran in the Middle East conflict which has kept oil prices elevated

zh.title: 随着中东冲突使油价保持高位，通胀担忧重回聚焦，分析师表示
zh.summary: 美伊紧张局势升级导致中东油价保持高位，重新引发通胀担忧，分析师重新评估商品市场影响和地缘政治风险溢价。

title: General Motors is set to report earnings before the bell. Here's what Wall Street expects
summary: Wall Street analysts project General Motors will report adjusted earnings per share of $3.20 and revenue of $47.01 billion in its upcoming earnings announcement.
content: Wall Street analysts expect General Motors to report adjusted earnings per share of $3.20 and revenue of $47.01 billion.

zh.title: 通用汽车将在开盘前公布财报。以下是华尔街的预期
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师预计通用汽车将在即将公布的财报中报告调整后每股收益为3.20美元，营收为470.1亿美元。

title: Your healthcare could now cost $185,500 in retirement — and that doesn’t include long-term care
summary: Rising healthcare costs and chronic disease management expenses have pushed estimated retirement healthcare costs to $185,500, excluding long-term care, underscoring growing financial burdens for retirees.
content: Rising prices for care and managing chronic conditions helped drive up the forecast.

zh.title: 退休医疗费用或高达18.55万美元——还不包括长期护理
zh.summary: 不断上升的医疗费用和慢性病管理成本已将退休医疗费用推升至18.55万美元，不包括长期护理，凸显了退休者面临的日益增加的财务负担。

title: Dimitri de Vreeze helped build DSM’s materials business. Then he had to sell it
summary: DSM-Firmenich CEO Dimitri de Vreeze reflects on the difficult decision to divest the materials business after 30+ years at the company, emphasizing how the strategic choice reshaped his understanding of success.
content: After more than three decades at science-based firm DSM, Dimitri de Vreeze faced what he calls the hardest decision of his career: selling the materials business where he had grown up professionally. In this episode of "Executive Decisions," the DSM-Firmenich CEO reflects on why the decision made strategic sense, even as it felt deeply personal, and how it shaped his view that success is not a finish line.

zh.title: 迪米特里·德·弗里泽帮助建立了DSM的材料业务。后来他不得不出售它
zh.summary: DSM-Firmenich首席执行官迪米特里·德·弗里泽反思了在该公司工作30多年后做出的艰难决定——出售材料业务，强调这一战略举措如何改变了他对成功的理解。

title: Ships shun Strait of Hormuz as renewed fighting strains key oil corridor
summary: Vessel traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has declined significantly following Trump's blockade implementation last week, impacting a critical global oil corridor. The slowdown could affect global energy prices and shipping patterns. This reflects geopolitical tensions affecting essential energy infrastructure.
content: Vessel traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has slumped since U.S. President Donald Trump's blockade took effect last week.

zh.title: 船只避开霍尔木兹海峡 新爆发的战斗加剧关键石油走廊压力
zh.summary: 上周特朗普实施封锁后，通过霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通量大幅下降，冲击了全球关键石油走廊。这一放缓可能影响全球能源价格和航运模式。这反映了影响关键能源基础设施的地缘政治紧张局势。

title: U.S. condemns China's 'dangerous and aggressive' acts after Philippine sailor injured at disputed shoal
summary: A Philippine sailor was injured at a disputed shoal, prompting U.S. condemnation of China's actions. The incident occurs amid regional diplomatic meetings involving Southeast Asian and Chinese officials. The flare-up reflects ongoing territorial tensions in the region.
content: The flare-up came before Rubio is expected to visit Manila for meetings of Southeast Asian foreign ministers, with Chinese diplomat Wang Yi also in attendance.

zh.title: 菲律宾水手在争议浅滩受伤后 美国谴责中国"危险且咄咄逼人"的行为
zh.summary: 一名菲律宾水手在争议浅滩处受伤，引发美国谴责中国的行为。该事件发生在涉及东南亚和中国官员的地区外交会议期间。这次升级反映了该地区持续存在的领土紧张关系。

title: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
summary: The Trump administration has imposed 50% tariffs on Canadian goods, marking a significant escalation in North American trade tensions. Canada has vowed to intensify trade negotiations in response. The move threatens to disrupt bilateral economic relations between the neighbors.
content: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

zh.title: 特朗普对加拿大征收50%关税 卡尼誓言"加强"贸易谈判
zh.summary: 特朗普政府对加拿大商品征收50%关税，标志着北美贸易紧张局势的重大升级。加拿大已承诺加强贸易谈判作为回应。此举威胁到两个邻国之间的双边经济关系。

title: U.S. hits Canada with stiff new tariffs, escalating trade tensions
summary: The Trump administration announced 50% tariffs on certain Canadian goods, citing discriminatory trade practices by Ottawa against U.S. automobiles, dairy, and alcohol industries. The tariffs represent a major policy shift targeting perceived trade imbalances. This escalates ongoing North American trade disputes.
content: The Trump administration on Monday said it would slap 50% tariffs on some goods imported from Canada, in an effort to end what it sees as discriminatory trade practices by Ottawa against the U.S. automobile, dairy and alcohol industries.

zh.title: 美国对加拿大实施严厉新关税，加剧贸易紧张局势
zh.summary: 特朗普政府宣布对某些加拿大商品征收50%的关税，理由是渥太华对美国汽车、乳制品和酒精产业的歧视性贸易行为。这些关税代表了针对感知到的贸易失衡的重大政策转变。这加剧了正在进行的北美贸易争端。
